name: Open-Meteo
description: Free weather forecast API with hourly and daily forecasts, historical data, and climate projections worldwide

name: wttr.in
description: Weather service with simple API returning current conditions and forecasts in JSON, plain text, or PNG formats

name: Aviation Stack
description: Real-time flight status, schedules, airline routes, airports, and aviation data (free tier, no key needed for basic queries)

name: OpenSky Network
description: Live aircraft tracking and flight data including real-time positions, velocity, and altitude of flights worldwide

name: Frankfurter
description: Real-time and historical foreign exchange rates from the European Central Bank — great for travel budgeting

name: ExchangeRate-API (free tier)
description: Up-to-date currency exchange rates for 160+ currencies, no key required for basic endpoint

name: Nominatim (OpenStreetMap)
description: Geocoding and reverse geocoding API — convert addresses to coordinates and vice versa, globally

name: Open-Elevation
description: Free elevation data API — returns altitude in meters for any latitude/longitude on Earth

name: REST Countries
description: Detailed info on every country: capitals, currencies, languages, timezones, flags, calling codes, and borders

name: GeoNames
description: Geographical database covering all countries with cities, postal codes, timezones, and elevation data

name: World Time API
description: Returns current local time for any timezone — useful for knowing local time at a travel destination

name: TimeZoneDB
description: Time zone data by city or coordinates, including UTC offset and daylight saving time info

name: GBFS (Bike Share)
description: General Bikeshare Feed Specification — real-time availability of shared bikes and scooters in hundreds of cities globally

name: Transport for London (TfL) Unified API
description: Live arrivals, disruptions, journey planner, and status for all London transport modes including Tube, bus, and rail

name: SNCF Open Data
description: Real-time French train schedules, disruptions, and station information across France

name: 511 SF Bay (511.org)
description: Real-time transit, traffic, and parking data for the San Francisco Bay Area

name: Global Airport Database
description: Static and semi-live info on 9,300+ airports worldwide including IATA codes, coordinates, and runways

name: Sunrise-Sunset
description: Returns accurate sunrise, sunset, solar noon, and twilight times for any coordinates and date

name: Open Notify (ISS Location)
description: Real-time position of the International Space Station and next pass times over any location — unique travel curiosity tool

name: OpenAQ
description: Real-time and historical air quality data from thousands of monitoring stations in 100+ countries

name: WAQI (World Air Quality Index)
description: Live AQI readings and pollution data for thousands of cities globally — essential for health-conscious travelers

name: USGS Earthquake Hazards
description: Real-time global earthquake data including magnitude, depth, and location — updated every minute

name: CDC Travel Health Notices
description: Up-to-date health and disease outbreak notices for international travel destinations

name: Overpass API (OpenStreetMap)
description: Query OpenStreetMap data live — find nearby hotels, restaurants, ATMs, hospitals, transit stops, and POIs anywhere on Earth

name: Wikivoyage API
description: Free travel guide content for destinations worldwide via the MediaWiki API — attractions, itineraries, and tips

name: OSRM (Open Source Routing Machine)
description: Fast route planning and turn-by-turn directions between any coordinates using OpenStreetMap road data — walking, cycling, and driving modes

name: Openrouteservice
description: Advanced routing API with directions, isochrones (reachability zones), and matrix distances — great for optimizing a day's itinerary

name: Valhalla Routing (Mapzen)
description: Open-source multimodal routing engine supporting driving, walking, cycling, and transit with time-based optimization

name: Wikipedia API
description: Fetch summaries, full articles, and nearby Wikipedia pages for any location — surface history and context for places on your itinerary

name: Wikipedia Geosearch
description: Returns Wikipedia articles for landmarks and points of interest within a radius of any lat/lng coordinate

name: OpenTripMap
description: Database of 1M+ tourist attractions worldwide with categories, ratings, and descriptions — query by radius around any coordinate

name: Wikidata SPARQL
description: Query structured data about museums, landmarks, events, and places worldwide — hours, coordinates, images, and more

name: Open Library
description: Find travel guides and destination books by location — useful for deeper research on a place you're visiting

name: Public Holidays API
description: Returns public holidays for any country and year — critical for knowing what will be open or closed during your visit

name: Calendarific
description: Global holiday and observance data for 230+ countries including religious, national, and regional holidays

name: Ticketmaster Discovery API
description: Live events, concerts, sports, and shows near any location or city — surface things to do on specific dates

name: OpenAgenda API
description: Aggregated local events and cultural agendas for cities across France and Europe — concerts, exhibitions, festivals

name: STIB/MIVB Brussels Transit
description: Real-time arrivals and schedules for Brussels public transport — buses, trams, and metro

name: NavitiaIO
description: Multimodal journey planning API covering transit networks in 40+ countries — plan trips with walking, transit, and bike legs

name: CityBikes API
description: Real-time bike share station availability for 400+ cities worldwide — find available bikes near your next stop

name: Photon (Komoot)
description: Fast, open geocoding and place search API powered by OpenStreetMap — autocomplete for addresses and POI names

name: UV Index API (OpenUV)
description: Real-time UV index and sun protection data for any location — plan outdoor activities around safe sun exposure windows

name: Marine Weather (Open-Meteo Marine)
description: Wave height, sea temperature, wind direction, and swell data for coastal and ocean locations — ideal for beach day planning

name: Flood & River Gauge Data (USGS Water Services)
description: Real-time stream flow, river levels, and flood stage data for US waterways — useful for hiking and outdoor activity planning

name: National Park Service API
description: Hours, alerts, closures, amenities, and visitor info for all US National Parks — essential for day trip planning

name: Recreation.gov RIDB API
description: Campsite availability, facility hours, and recreation area info for federally managed US lands

name: Numbeo (Quality of Life)
description: Crowd-sourced cost of living, restaurant price indices, and safety ratings for cities worldwide — budget your day accurately

name: Open Food Facts
description: Database of food products by country and region — discover local foods, allergen info, and nutritional data when eating out

name: Zomato / Rapid API Restaurant Search
description: Restaurant discovery with cuisine types, ratings, and locations searchable by city or coordinates

name: MealDB
description: Search meals by country of origin — explore local cuisine and traditional dishes of any destination before or during your trip

name: Google Civic Information API
description: Polling locations, election info, and civic data by address — useful for travelers who need to vote absentee or understand local governance

name: Mapillary API
description: Street-level photos from around the world contributed by users — preview streets, trails, and neighborhoods before you visit
